message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Bitwise primitives

Adds 36 comprehensive oracle tests for BitwiseAnd, BitwiseOr,
BitwiseXor, and BitwiseNot primitives covering:
- Basic bit pattern operations
- Identity elements (0 for XOR/OR, -1 for AND)
- Annihilator elements (0 for AND, -1 for OR)
- Idempotence (x & x = x, x | x = x)
- Self-cancellation (x ^ x = 0)
- Commutativity
- De Morgan's laws: ~(a & b) = (~a) | (~b)
- Distributive laws
- Absorption laws
- XOR associativity
- 1D, 2D, and 3D tensor shapes
- Practical bit manipulation (masking, setting, toggling)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
